feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: INCLUDE TYPE not available on S/4 HANA?
entry.content:
I am trying to extend SAPs service consumption models to include navigations in my partner namespace structures. It seems 'INCLUDE TYPE is no longer recognized syntax in S/4 HANA 2023.

After using 'INCLUDE TYPE', a structure literally called 'include' that needs to be referenced as "ls_struct-include-field_name" is created.  

I have imported various API Hub edmx files as service consumption models to create my initial classes. Is there a work around to not having access to the old 'INCLUDE TYPE / INCLUDE STRUCTURE' in recent versions of ABAP cloud?

 

TYPES:
      BEGIN OF tys_product_type,
        product TYPE c LENGTH 40,
        etag TYPE string,
      END OF tys_product_type.

TYPES:
     BEGIN OF tys_extended_product_type,
        product_description        TYPE tyt_product_description_type,
        product_ewmwarehouse       TYPE tyt_product_ewmwarehouse_type,
        INCLUDE TYPE tys_product_type,
     END OF tys_extended_product_type.

----
"Usage
ls_entity_key TYPE tys_extended_product_type
ls_entity_key = VALUE #( include-product  = zif_api_hub~mv_doc_num ).

entry.title: Update permitted usages - 3 Tier extensibility model
entry.content:
In our S/4 HANA 2023 FPS02 system, INHERITING FROM /iwbep/cl_v4_abs_pm_model_prov is not permitted in tier 1 (ABAP version ABAP CLOUD).

Following SAPs guide on using client proxys in on-premise systems, All of our consumption models for client proxy inherit from this interface. Therefore, all our client proxy classes need to be put into a Tier 2 software component. 

I can see that in BTP ABAP systems, usage of /iwbep/cl_v4_abs_pm_model_prov is allowed. 

So, how do we update our on-premise system to get new permissions on what objects are allowed for use without moving usage into Tier 2 wrappers?

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Is there any way to use se38 report in SAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Scenario: I'm using sflight table but its delivered empty record. So, sap help portal suggesting use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR report. problem is SAP public cloud is not allowing to execute reports (SE38). is there any way to use SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR?

Regards,

Nirojan.

entry.title: /DMO/FLIGHT maintain data public cloud system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to generate data in /DMO/FLIGHT. there is a report SAPBC_DATA_GENERATOR (SE38). but I'm using public cloud system. public cloud we don't have GUI access. is there any way to add the data into sflight table?

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: User license type applicable for apps developed with Developer extension
entry.content:
Hi,

I am planning a Developer extension to S/4HANA Cloud with RAP.
The RAP will use Business Object Interfaces ( I_JOURNALENTRYTP).
Which user license type will be applied to the users of that extension app: self-service use / core use / advanced use?
Or does only Digital Access count?

Best regards.

entry.title: Automatic integration of Change Documents in managed RAP BO not supported on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi community,

I've used change documents in RAP before, but I needed to handle it within an additional save method. I just realized (must be quite new) that there is now a more automatic integration possible explained here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/integrating-change-documents?locale=en-US

I tried using this in my RAP behaviour definition, but I am getting a syntax error for the following statement:

changedocuments master ( <id_of_the_chdoc_obj> )

It states that "changedocuments" is not supported with the current ABAP release. I am working on a Public Cloud system. I'm wondering on which release this is working (maybe ABAP Platform on BTP?). This would be one of the first things I encounter, which is supported over there but not on public cloud.

Can someone confirm this? It would also be great to know if this will also be available for Public Cloud.

Thanks in advance!
Daniel

entry.title: Public cloud HR master data of userid and pernr (person number (PA0105))
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to fetch the data from PA0105(HR master data) table in public cloud tenant. I need pernr and userid fields. I tried with custom cds view it's not working, is there any way to call the PA0105 / any standard APIs/ services? 

I checked Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub I couldn't be able to find anything related to HR Master.

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: I want to migrate the configuration from NAST to BRF+ between S/4HANA and Commerce Automation.
entry.content: I want to migrate the configuration from NAST to BRF+ between S/4HANA and Commerce Automation. Does anyone know where I can find documentation or the steps to follow for that?

entry.title: is there any way to call table in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any way to call the table in public cloud? for my case I need PERNR and Userid fields from PA0105 table. did anyone know CDS/ API or any other ways?

I checked SAP Business Accelerator Hub. I couldn't able to find the fields PERNR and USERID

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: REST Interface with free Structure in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to develop a REST interface in ABAP Cloud that accepts an arbitrary JSON payload. The idea is that I don't have too much control over payload and would like to pick up only some parts that are interesting to me. In old world, I could simply develop a service using IF_HTTP_EXTENSION and IF_REST_* interfaces. None of these seem to be available in ABAP Cloud. 

Is there an alternative to this approach in ABAP Cloud? I guess one workaround would be to use Large Objects available in RAP but I don't like how API looks like. I would really like to prefer to just receive JSON payload via POST on an endpoint.

Thanks

entry.title: BTP TRAIL ABAP Instance Unavailable
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am unable to login to my BTP ABAP instance and system shows below error in Eclipse.

Same is the case in BTP account as well.

Please let me know if its a global issue or a local issue in my account.

entry.title: API Integration consume API passing attachment as http link for the 3rd party user to download
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I am working on api integration for Purchase Requisition between SAP and PROCOL. We have to consume the API shared by the client to transfer the data between SAP and PROCOL. We are doing this integration through PIPO. PIPO Consultant has created interface which we have used it in our abap program.

There is only one point which I could not able to achieve. The PR would be having attachments which I have to send it to PROCOL as http link as shown below in a variable of the nested structure shared by PROCOL.

Is it possible that the image attachment which was associated with the PR would be shared as http link by passing into the structure?

entry.title: Create custom entity with compositions exposed as OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question which I am not able to solve by myself ^^

My requirement basically is to create a new custom API in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud that allows me, for a given {warehouse + batch-managed product + quantity}, to find the list of all batch numbers, that can be consumed to address that batch-managed product's quantity based on some rules.

I gave myself as objective to create this structure as output of my new custom API, with a header structure (giving the status of the batch determination logic) and an item list (giving the list of all the batch numbers that should be used for the consumption, with the quantity to be consumed in each batch):

I started by created 2 custom CDS entities: one for the header structure and another one for the item structure.

I added this annotation to both these 2 custom CDS entities "@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" where "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" is a custom class referencing interface "IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER" In order to be able to trigger its method "SELECT" when someone tries to retrieve data from either one of my 2 custom CDS entities. 

In order to have a parent-child relationship between my 2 custom CDS entities, I added a composition statement in the header custom entity CDS view and an association to parent statement in the line-items child custom entity CDS view.

Custom Entity for the Header parent CDS view:

Custom Entity for the Line-Item Child CDS view:

Then I implemented code for the SELECT statement of my custom class ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1.

Once done, I created a new service definition exposing both my 2 custom cds entities:

Then I exposed my service definition into an OData V4 API service binding, followed with the normal communication scenario, comm arrangement configuration..

My problem is that, once all this is done, when I try to execute my API from POSTMAN, I am not able to get the header AND the item data AT THE SAME TIME.

I am able for instance to get data for the header custom entity CDS view with the correct structure I defined: 

I am also able to get data for the line_item custom entity CDS view, for the different batch numbers to use for the consumption as per the structure I designed:

But, How can I merge these two results of these 2 entities in the same response?

I want my custom API response to be similar to the following one: 

How can I accomplish this please?

I thought by creating a composition relationship between these 2 custom entities, that the SELECT method will fetch data for both header and Item custom entity CDS views and that the result will be merged in the same response, but it is not.

Also, when I run a GET OData call to the header entity, "SELECT" method of class "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET0" is called only once, and "io_request->get_entity_id( )" gives "ZC_TEST_BATCH_DETERMIN_HD" as entity. This means, that my logic is being executed ONLY on the header custom CDS view, which is not enough to fulfill my requirement.

Then I tried to add "$expand" to the OData URL to execute, by adding "?$expand=_BatchDetItemDetails" to my URL:

but I am getting HTTP Bad Request error in POSTMAN : "

"The expand option's expand path contains an invalid property '_BatchDetItemDetails'",

Can someone help me on this please? I feel like my custom API is not designed to "accept" any "expand" attribute. 

Or if you have another idea on how to achieve this, without having to use the "?$expand" statement?

Thanks experts

entry.title: Unable to delete Application Job Catalog on ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I ran an ABAP class for creating an application job catalog.

Unfortunetly, the transport request number was wrong, so the creation failed.

I tried to put the right transport request number, but the creation of the application job catalog fail with the error :

Creation of job catalog entry failed: Object ZMY_OBJECT (type job catalog entry) already exists.

However, there is no job catalog under the Application Job Catalog Entries folder, neither in the IAM Apps folder.

Is there a way to do a clean delete of the catalog ? Or do I have to create a new catalog with a new name ?

Thanks in advance,

Rémy

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

Please support

Best regards,Antony Pantoja

entry.title: How to consume a RAP Behavior Event for R_JOURNAL- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ( ABAP CLOUD )
entry.content:
Hello Experts

How can I consume a standard event of the Behavior Definition finance object “R_JOURNALENTRYTP” locally in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - In-App Developer Extensibility system ?

Or how you could detect the create or modify events of a financial accounting entry. To run an abap cloud development in parallel or by background job ?. Such a process contains commits and updates other objects.

Currently, in the Custom Logic App I have not been able to find a BADI that meets my requirement and allows me to run an abap development in parallel at the time of a creation or modification of an accounting entry.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

ABAP Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment ABAP Development 

Please support

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: HCM - Payroll Issue
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm facing an issue recently when I try to run a payroll cycle on SAP.
issue message "No entry in table T512W for key EG for time 31.07.2025. I already checked the table and found the wage type exists. Also, I checked the processing class and everything is alright. In addition to checking the MOLGA country grouping and its already configured and linked.

 I tried to search a lot for a reason for this error message but with no answers.

If anyone already faced this issue kindly share the solution with me for urgent reason.

entry.title: ABAP Proxy Transfoms ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In S/4HANA On Premise/Private Cloud to transform an abap proxy into xml, and vice versa, we can use the CL_PROXY_XML_TRANSFORM class.

Unfortunately this class is not released for use in the cloud.

Is there a class in S/4HANA Public Cloud, which has the same functionality?

If not, can you suggest an alternative way for the transformation?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards.

Marco Spera

entry.title: bapi_po_create1 : passing standard table field J_1BNBM into bapi
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I have a field J_1BNBM in EKPO table which is getting field with control code.
There is validaion in po creation ME21N using method IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM to make the field as mandatory due to which I am getting the
same error while using the BAPI_PO_CREATE1.
However, there is no field available  in line item of BAPI_PO_CREATE1 of related to J_1BNBM or control code.
The bapi will only post the PO if I could able to pass control_code(J_1BNBM)  using the same BAPI.
I thought of using as well as tried to achieve it through extension . But extension is for only customer add on fields .

J_1BNBM is standard field in EKPO and not customer field.

How to resolve this issue as I am at crossroads now ?

entry.title: Shared Object Memory for ABAP for Cloud Development?
entry.content:
There are great posts available showing how to utilize shared memory objects & SAP transaction 'SHMA' that can be used in Standard ABAP.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/shared-memory-objects-transfer-data-between-abap-programs/ba-p/13451524

While refactoring for ABAP for Cloud Development, I came accross the error "The use of Interface IF_SHM_BUILD_INSTANCE" is not permitted. Is there any equivalent to Shared Object Memory Areas that is compatible with ABAP for Cloud Development ABAP syntax?

ABAP Cloud Development usage Error

Yoloyoda's abap cloud cheatsheet does give an example of using the DATA BUFFER, however, this does not seem to be on par with the control we used to have SHMA.


__PRESENT
